source: Re-baselined 2026-07-12T23:29Z on the Phase 4.3 ENLARGED corpus (531 cases; tool_selection 55→172: 39 seed + 132 positive-mined @0.6 + 1 flywheel @1.0). toolSelection 35.43 is NOT comparable to the prior 53.59 incumbent — positive-mined cases replay context-dependent production tool sets without thread context, a harder and noisier yardstick (weight 0.6 discounts them). The gate remains RELATIVE: candidate vs THIS incumbent on THIS corpus. Run-to-run variance on the enlarged corpus is UNMEASURED (~$5.16/run) — before tightening epsilon below 2.0, take 2-3 repeat runs; larger n should reduce variance vs the ±2.2 seen at 55 cases. Supersedes the 2026-07-12T05:17Z decontamination baseline (74.79/53.59).
note: Refresh with `npm run eval:gate -- --run --update-baseline` after a confirmed-good model swap. epsilon is composite points on the 0-100 scale.
